div.label: Email address
div.small: We'll never share your email with anyone else.

div.p: Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card's content.
This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content. This content is a little bit longer.

t.div: This is a "" alert with a link.

i.class: fa fa-info-circle fa-lg fa-stack d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center me-3 p-2 rounded-1

div.div: An example alert with an icon

div.class: modal position-relative d-block p-5 h-auto rounded-3 z-0

div.p: This is a paragraph. Ambitioni dedisse scripsisse iudicaretur. Nihilne te nocturnum praesidium Palati, nihil urbis vigiliae. Unam incolunt Belgae, aliam Aquitani, tertiam. Integer legentibus erat a ante historiarum dapibus. Phasellus laoreet lorem vel dolor tempus vehicula.
Paragraph with bold, muted and italic texts

input.name: search
input.class: search-query form-control oe_search_box border-0 text-bg-light border-0 bg-light

t.t-value: 'bg-body' if i == null else ('o_cc o_cc%s' % i if (isinstance(i, int) and i > 0 and i < 6) else 'bg-%s' % i)
'Preset %s' % i if (isinstance(i, int) and i > 0 and i < 6) else 'bg-%s' % i

div.p: Small text. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.

div.class: d-flex gap-2 align-items-center border-top pt-2 mt-2

nav.class: navbar navbar-expand-md px-0 py-0 mb-3 border rounded
